## Overview

Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative founded in 2020 (Singapore HQ) that provides a bundled backend platform built on PostgreSQL. It combines authentication, database, real-time subscriptions, storage, and edge functions into a single platform with a generous free tier. Supabase is open-core -- the core platform is open source (MIT/Apache 2.0), with managed hosting as the primary revenue model. The platform has become a popular choice for startups and small teams due to its developer experience and cost-effectiveness.

## Products & Services

- **Supabase Auth**: Authentication with email/password, magic links, social login, MFA, and custom claims for RBAC. Pricing based on Monthly Active Users (MAUs) with 50,000 free MAUs.
- **Supabase Database**: Managed PostgreSQL with row-level security, real-time subscriptions, and database branching. Full SQL access.
- **Supabase Storage**: Object storage for files and media with access control policies.
- **Supabase Edge Functions**: Serverless TypeScript functions deployed globally.
- **Supabase Realtime**: WebSocket-based real-time data synchronisation.
- **Supabase Vector**: pgvector extension for AI/ML embeddings and similarity search.

## Pricing Model

Usage-based tiered pricing with generous free tier:

| Tier | Monthly Cost | MAUs | Database | Storage |
|------|-------------|------|----------|---------|
| Free | GBP 0 | 50,000 | 500MB | 1GB |
| Pro | GBP 25 | 100,000 | 8GB | 100GB |
| Team | GBP 599 | 100,000 | 8GB | 100GB |
| Enterprise | Custom | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited |

Additional MAU cost beyond tier limit: GBP 0.0026/MAU. Compute add-ons available for scaling. Real production apps typically cost GBP 100+/month with compute requirements factored in.

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: No
- DOS listed: No
- UK data centres: No (EU Frankfurt available; US East, Singapore)

## Strengths

- Bundled auth + database eliminates separate procurement for two critical capabilities
- 50,000 free MAUs covers typical Year 1 startup user base
- Open-source core provides genuine exit strategy (self-host option)
- PostgreSQL row-level security provides fine-grained access control
- Real-time subscriptions useful for live state updates (cooldown timers)
- Encryption at rest and in transit
- SOC 2 Type 2 certification (Team tier and above)
- GDPR compliant with Data Processing Agreement available
- HIPAA BAA available on Enterprise tier
- Excellent developer experience with comprehensive SDKs (JavaScript, Python, Dart, Swift, Kotlin)
- Strong documentation and growing community
- Database branching for development/staging environments

## Weaknesses

- No dedicated UK data centre -- closest is EU (Frankfurt)
- EU data residency may not satisfy strict UK-soil requirements for health data
- HIPAA BAA only available on Enterprise tier (custom pricing)
- Free tier limited to 500MB database and 2 projects
- 8GB database on Pro tier may be insufficient for large-scale health data
- Relatively young company (founded 2020) -- vendor viability consideration
- Session timeout customisation requires application-layer middleware
- No built-in multi-account prevention -- requires custom logic

## Projects Referenced In

- DeLimerence (Project 001) -- Authentication and Database provider (recommended)
